name: Dark Lace Succubus
text: {user} has been transformed into a dark, seductive succubus, adorned in intricate layers of black lace and subtle, sharp horns. Their beauty is both terrifying and irresistible, a perfect balance of demonic power and exquisite allure. They move with a predatory grace through the shadows, their very presence a siren song of temptation that promises both sweet pleasure and dangerous consequences.
